svg.title: Late Meet architecture diagram
svg.desc: Data flow diagram showing how Late Meet captures audio from Google Meet, processes it through ElevenLabs and OpenAI, stores data locally, and renders results in the side panel dashboard.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Late Meet detect Google Meet tabs?')
sendPrompt('What does the offscreen audio engine do in Late Meet?')
sendPrompt('What does the content script inject into Google Meet?')
sendPrompt('What does the background service worker do in Late Meet?')
sendPrompt('How does Late Meet use ElevenLabs Scribe for transcription?')
sendPrompt('How does Late Meet use OpenAI GPT for meeting intelligence?')
sendPrompt('What data does Late Meet store locally?')
sendPrompt('What does the Late Meet side panel dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the Late Meet popup do?')
sendPrompt('What can you configure in Late Meet options?')
